resolutions.summary: PRD assumes Playwright E2E tests exist and must pass (FR-12, §9 Success Metrics, §4 scenarios, §6 Assumption A7), but tech-stack.md says 'No genuinely new technology is introduced' and only lists Jest + @testing-library/react for testing. Codebase-map.json key dependencies also don't include Playwright.
resolutions.decision: Add Playwright to tech-stack.md and confirm it exists in the codebase
